body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: Reliable and Available Wireless (RAW) Use Cases
Terminal-based joint selection and configuration of MEC host and RAW network
Requirements for Reliable Wireless Industrial Services
Extensions to enable wireless reliability and availability in multi-access edge deployments
